suggestions.title: Integrate Modern Dependency Lock Files
suggestions.description: The project uses basic package manifests without locking dependencies (e.g. poetry.lock, package-lock.json).
suggestions.benefit: Ensures deterministic environment installations across all production and developer machines.

suggestions.title: Configure Automated Linter and Code Quality Guards
suggestions.description: No static analysis checkers or style formatters (like Black, Ruff, ESLint) were identified.
suggestions.benefit: Prevents code regression, enforces standard naming conventions, and blocks common security vulnerability patterns in CI/CD pipelines.

suggestions.title: Adopt Fully Asynchronous Database Connections
suggestions.description: The codebase leverages async web frameworks but lacks async DB drivers.
suggestions.benefit: Drastically increases API throughput by avoiding blocking threads during database queries.

explanation: Generated 3 evolution suggestions for the project. Included recommendations for package lock integrations, code quality linting, and framework-specific upgrades.
